title: Villagers Trade Op Item
description: Minecraft But Villagers Trade Op Items Mod, make custom job blocks to trade op items
body:
## OP Villager Trades
## 
### This mod adds overpowered villager trades by introducing 4 new custom job blocks and one upgraded cleric.

Made for fun survival worlds, SMPs, and testing builds where normal villager trades feel too slow or boring.

New Job Blocks & Villagers

### OP Composter

![composter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f3d26b635d9058fefbc2734f937da0262962e98.png)

### OP Grindstone

![Grindstone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/534e064b18f58db77a8b2348e40b8283e7ba1da7_0.webp)

### OP Smithing Table

![smithing Table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb397f2e51f54c3364fd4ae94aaa411ff4512457.png)

### OP Blast Furnace

![Blast Furnace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c76d9ceb0b041d862e2ed9f8d5cb8334e48a3df6.png)

### Cleric (Vanilla)

Uses the normal Brewing Stand

Trades are upgraded compared to vanilla

Useful for potions and rare items

### Features

4 custom villager professions

Custom workstation blocks

1 upgraded vanilla cleric

No commands required

Works in survival worlds


### Compatibility

Minecraft version: 1.21.8

Mod loader: Fabric
